Bathrooms

Bathrooms planned, waterproofed and finished with measured detail.

The bathroom line on the studio card becomes a full delivery scope here: planning, waterproofing, tiling, fitting and final finish control.

Manchester North West - Lancashire Plan / Design / Craft

Service Overview

A bathroom service built around detail control.

From strip-out and first-fix planning to tile setting, brassware alignment and final detailing, the bathroom scope is managed as one joined-up service.

  • Survey-led planning before demolition and first-fix.
  • Feature tile layouts and stone-led finish palettes.
  • Integrated carpentry and storage where the brief demands it.
  • Clean handover standards with no rushed final detailing.

Service Priorities

How the studio keeps this scope premium.

01

Layout discipline

Circulation, shower zones and storage are resolved before wet-zone work starts.

02

Material control

Every tile, trim and brass finish is coordinated for one visual language.

03

Craft execution

Setting out, waterproofing and finish alignment stay under close supervision.

Case Study

Didsbury ensuite rebuild

A compact ensuite upgraded into a darker, richer composition with aligned tile cuts, bespoke joinery and a controlled stone palette.

10-14 day programme Stone and brass palette Bespoke storage detailing

Material Language

Gallery references for this service line.

FAQ

Common questions before the brief is shaped.

Do you handle full strip-out bathroom projects?

Yes. We manage strip-out, preparation, waterproofing, installation and final finishing as one controlled sequence.

Can you help refine the material palette?

Yes. Stone tone, metal finish and tile format decisions are part of the design phase, not an afterthought.

What budget range suits this service?

Most premium bathroom briefs sit between £8,000 and £20,000 depending on layout change, materials and bespoke detailing.
